articles.title: Bondi Beach attack: Australia royal commission into antisemitism begins - BBC
articles.description: The inquiry comes after 15 people were killed and dozens hurt when two gunmen opened fire at a Jewish event.
articles.content: "I acknowledge that for some, it will never be right to speak of closure, but one small part of coming to terms with the events of that evening will be the work of this commission," Bell said in her … [+26 chars]
